text:
The sharpest razor I've found for people: The ones who gained "consciousness" at around 12-14 vs 18 and later.

Never fails.

Most ppl don't understand why this tech is VERY important.

Lucid Dreaming is basically a AI-like promptable role-play with your (personal + sometimes collective) unconscious, think of it like in-your-mind VR where the content is the deepest parts of you.

Edison, Descartes,

Anchor points will tell all

Level 3: Tells the story from their childhood w great detail and/or ages 8-12 (this is the 12-14 group).
Level 2: "When I was in college.." (normie)
Level 1: "Wdym by 'consciousness' exactly??" (NPC)

If you're broke + technical and want to make a quick $100k - just build "lifetime" versions of dumb products that overcharge people.

If you just created a 1:1 copy of something like ManyChat and offered that for $1000/lifetime, you'd make SOME money unless you're thick
Some will say "I had it way earlier than 12" and once you dig a little, you realize it happened around 12-14 and they were able to recall & connect to the previous points afterwards. Never fails
Optimizing for the feeling of "aliveness" is the ultimate secret to life. It's basically expansion + joy + challenge + growth + presence in the same bucket.
